case_title: JAMES RUIMY VS. WILLIAM LYNCH et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUIMY, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, WILLIAM LYNCH, SANDRA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED
